Signal

Mine the belt. Extend the chain.

Play Soundtrack GitHub

C + Sokol • No external assets • Singleplayer / Multiplayer

01 Mine
Fracture
Break asteroids from XL down to fragments. Sweep ore into the hold with the tractor beam.
02 Supply
Trade
Sell ore at refineries. Stations smelt ingots, fabricate parts, and post contracts for what they need.
03 Expand
Build
Order scaffolds, tow them into place, found outposts. Push signal coverage deeper into the belt.
Signal range determines everything. Ship response, mining speed, NPC autonomy, and station connectivity all degrade outside coverage. Three starter stations form a strained frontier community. Expand the network or work the edges — and throw rocks at anyone who gets in the way.
W/S thrust   A/D turn   Space mine   E dock   R tractor   B build   O autopilot   H hail
Soundtrack Source ratimics
